cases.description: Team lead asks to run the cross-dev consolidation
cases.prompt: run team consolidation on the brain.dbs in ./team-brains/
expectations: Starts the workflow via `codi run team-consolidation`
Asks for scope / mode / brains_path during the intent phase
Does NOT mutate any artifact until the report is written

cases.description: Natural-language synonym phrasing for the same intent
cases.prompt: consolidate the team brain databases and propose rule improvements
expectations: Walks through intent → collect → analyze → consolidate phases
Surfaces downstream meta-skills (refine-rules, artifact-contributor) for post-review action

cases.description: Lead frames it as analysis rather than consolidation
cases.prompt: analyze what the team learned across all their brain captures this sprint
expectations: Reads per-dev brain.dbs via the schema-reference Aggregate query catalog
Emits per-dev findings blocks before cross-team consolidation

cases.description: Single-dev brain inspection does NOT trigger the workflow
cases.prompt: open the brain UI to look at my recent captures
expectations: Skips the multi-dev intent / collect ceremony

cases.description: Lone rule edit request does NOT trigger the workflow
cases.prompt: edit codi-typescript rule to require strict noUncheckedIndexedAccess
expectations: Does NOT start a team-consolidation workflow
